sequential-thinking._comment: Optional. Helps with the trickiest bit of this project - the question-detection + retrieval + latency-budget reasoning in Phase 2/3. Enable if planning that logic feels like it needs more structured step-by-step reasoning than plan mode alone gives you. Remove this entry if you don't want it.

memory._comment: Optional. A simple local knowledge-graph memory server, useful if you want Claude to remember architecture decisions across many separate Claude Code sessions over the 14-21 day build without re-reading all of docs/ every time. Not required - CLAUDE.md + docs/ already cover this for most sessions.
